title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
